name: twist-alex-setup-available
description: TWiST pack — comparison / absurdity / 'imagine / like / reminds me of' language primed for Alex (joker slot) data-comp jokes.

input.transcript: Imagine, hypothetically, if your Series A pitch deck was like — I mean literally like — a ridiculous joke. Nobody would invest. Compared to the real founders, these guys are always, every time, making the same cap-table mistake. It reminds me of every failed demo day in 2021. Picture this, in theory, a founder walks into an investor meeting with an AI wrapper and says 'it's similar to ChatGPT but with better margins.' Ridiculous. Absurd.
